info.title: MermaidGraph.NET
info.description: Create a mermaid graph of the dependency diagram for a project, or whole solution.

options.name: --path
options.description: Full path to the solution (*.sln) or project (*.csproj) file that will be mapped.

options.name: --type
options.description: The type of diagram to generate (e.g., Graph or Class). [default: Graph]

options.name: --filter
options.description: Exclude projects whose name matches the filter. (e.g., Test). []

options.name: --no-nuget
options.description: Do not include NuGet packages in the graph. [default: False]
